summary: The final cursor-consumption gap is fixed: only a completed checkpoint for the resume node on the current input HEAD clears the cursor, while a historical-HEAD completion plus current failure retains it. Focused verification passes 72/72 on the exact HEAD.

judgment_delta: Previous historical-checkpoint concern resolved because matching node_id, current input_head_sha, and completed status are required; the regression fixture and exact-HEAD 72/72 verification confirm it.
